originalBehavior: The source account scope spans many interactive projects and repositories, without a single local browsing surface for the shipped replica subset.
localStatus: The local route creates one curated hub page that surfaces the already-shipped replicas through grouped local cards and local docs links.
notes: The route is intentionally a local curation page rather than a replica of one repository listing view.
The public body links only to local routes and local docs pages.
evidence: The route exposes grouped cards for systems, stories, and playgrounds.
Shared smoke coverage checks the local card count, local route hrefs, and responsive shell.

originalBehavior: The shipped interactive collection spans systems explainers, narrative games, and emotionally focused story routes.
localStatus: The local hub preserves that range by grouping local routes into systems-and-society cards plus stories-and-games cards.
notes: The cluster cards point to the local replicas and local docs routes only.
The grouping is editorial but intentionally mirrors the strongest learning and replay entry points.
evidence: The systems cluster includes trust, polygons, ballot, crowds, neurons, and covid-19.
The stories cluster includes anxiety, coming-out-simulator-2014, wbwwb, and remember.

originalBehavior: The interactive collection includes editable sandbox-style tools as well as narrative or article-led experiences.
localStatus: The local hub keeps the sandbox routes in a separate playground cluster while maintaining footer-only provenance and local metadata shell behavior.
notes: The playground cluster links to both the launcher and the simulator route where useful.
The shared footer is the only public original-page reference surface on the hub route.
evidence: The route includes dedicated cards for LOOPY and the simulator launcher path.
Implementation planning treated local-only navigation and responsive shell behavior as the core validation requirements for this hub.
